protocol.step: 1. Reproduce with minimal example (smallest batch, CPU if possible)
2. Check tensor shapes at every module boundary
3. Check for NaN/Inf: torch.isnan(loss).any() before backward
4. Check gradient flow: named_parameters() with requires_grad + grad norms
5. Isolate: freeze everything, unfreeze one component at a time
6. Log: loss per component (NTP vs JEPA), not just total

common_failures.failure: Alignment loss stuck at ~1.0: projection not initialized properly, check Linear init
NTP loss diverging: learning rate too high for Hermes, try 1e-5
CUDA OOM: enable gradient_checkpointing, reduce batch_size, check for retained graphs
ONNX export fails: dynamic control flow in LeWM — trace instead of script
TRT engine crash on Jetson: SM mismatch — must build engine ON the Jetson
